nodes.name: Yellow-capped pygmy parrot
nodes.summary: Yellow-capped pygmy parrot（Micropsitta keiensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-capped pygmy parrot。

nodes.name: Micropsitta
